title: Lightweight Lights
description:
A lightweight mod&datapack that adds dynamic lights.

NOTE: DOESN'T WORK GREAT ON WEAK MULTIPLAYER SERVERS

Made By TeamJEM.
body:
**Summary: A lightweight datapack that adds dynamic lights.**

# **Made By TeamJEM**

Basically whenever you hold out certain items the area around you will light up without you having to place them.

**Items that work [MAINHAND AND OFFHAND]: Soul Torch, Torch, Soul Lantern, Lantern.**

NOTE: DOESN'T WORK GREAT ON WEAK MULTIPLAYER SERVERS

**[TO DONATE GO TO DONATE LINK AND BUY A COPY FOR MONEY]**
